form.formComment: Was out of placings last time (30.94) at The Meadows in a Grade 5, finishing sixth and beaten 12 lengths. Fairly consistent record from the draw including a win and five minors. Looks hard to beat with even luck.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Was out of placings last time (30.94) at The Meadows in a Grade 5, finishing sixth and beaten 12 lengths. Fairly consistent record from the draw including a win and five minors. Looks hard to beat with even luck.

form.formComment: Hit the frame last time at Sale but the start prior was an impressive winner after tracking the speed, scoring by 0.8 lengths in a Grade 5 at this track and recording an outstanding 22.60 over the 400m journey. Worth including on winning run two back.

form.formComment: Hit the ground running and set it up early clocking 22.80 with a 0.8 lengths win at this track over 400m. Was strong in the market and scored a soft win most recently. Stay with her.

formComments.comment: Hit the ground running and set it up early clocking 22.80 with a 0.8 lengths win at this track over 400m. Was strong in the market and scored a soft win most recently. Stay with her.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Quick to begin; Contacted on first turn and lost ground.

form.formComment: At the last start finished 4th in a Grade 4/5 on April 5 over 510m at Sale behind Lakeview Liam beaten 4 lengths (28.94). Rates among the chances this time.

form.formComment: Missed the frame last start when fifth and beaten 6 lengths at Sandown. Form solid prior to that including a win at Sandown three back. Has ability but needs to find best and others make more appeal.
